name: GT1 Combustion Inspection 2025
description: Annual combustion inspection on GE 7HA.02 Unit 1. 24000-hour scheduled outage. Combustion hardware inspection transition piece replacement fuel nozzle refurbishment and turbine controls calibration.

name: GT2 Hot Gas Path Inspection 2025
description: 48000-hour hot gas path inspection on GE 7HA.02 Unit 2. Full turbine section teardown buckets nozzles and shrouds replacement. Combustion hardware and transition pieces. GE LTP contract scope.

name: Inlet Air Chiller Expansion - GT1
description: Expansion of GT1 inlet air chilling capacity from 12F to 18F temperature reduction. Adds approximately 8MW additional summer capacity. Installation during winter low-demand period.

name: HRSG1 CEMS Upgrade
description: TCEQ-required continuous emissions monitoring system upgrade on HRSG Unit 1. New analyzers for NOx CO O2. CEMS recertification completed May 2025.

name: Cooling Tower Basin Recoating
description: Recoating of cooling tower basin CT-1 and CT-2. Protective epoxy coating on concrete basin. Nozzle and fill replacement. Scheduled during winter low-capacity period.

name: GT1 Major Overhaul Planning 2027
description: Long-lead planning for GT1 96000-hour major overhaul in Q1 2027. Compressor rotor replacement and full turbine rebuild under GE contractual service agreement. Parts ordered.
